name: Connect Discord
description: Create a Discord Bot and connect it to OpenClaw gateway via ClawDeckX

content.body:
A Discord Bot needs to be created in the Discord Developer Portal to obtain a Token.

**Prerequisites:**
- A Discord account
- A Discord server you manage (to invite the Bot)
- OpenClaw gateway running with model configured

steps.title: Create Discord Application
steps.description: Visit https://discord.com/developers/applications → Click "New Application" → Enter application name → Create.

steps.title: Get Bot Token
steps.description: On the application page, select "Bot" in the left sidebar → Click "Reset Token" to get the Token. **Important:** The Token is shown only once — copy and save it immediately. Enable Message Content Intent under "Privileged Gateway Intents".

steps.title: Invite Bot to Server
steps.description: Select "OAuth2" → "URL Generator" in the left sidebar → Check bot and applications.commands → Under Bot Permissions, check Send Messages, Read Message History, Add Reactions → Copy the generated URL, open it in a browser, select your server and authorize.

steps.title: Configure in ClawDeckX
steps.description: Go to Config Center → Channels → Click "Add Channel" → Select Discord. Paste the Bot Token in the Token field. If you want the Bot to work only in a specific server, you can fill in the guildId.

steps.title: Save and Test
steps.description: Click "Save" and wait for the gateway to reload. In your Discord server, @mention the Bot or send a message in DMs. Receiving an AI reply means setup is complete.
